prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on triplet O₂ (³Σg⁻ ground state) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (open-shell UKS). Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied file (single point, no re-optimization). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported — clean run. Integrity check: trustworthy = true.

Key results:
- HOMO energy: −8.8739616 eV (degenerate π* pair; HOMO−1 and HOMO both at this energy)
- LUMO energy: −3.5859031 eV (degenerate π* pair)
- HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.2880586 eV (headline value)
- Total electronic energy: −150.38872 Hartree (−4092.2855 eV)

The degenerate HOMO/HOMO−1 and LUMO/LUMO+1 pairs are consistent with the π* singly-occupied orbital structure of the O₂ triplet ground state.

CLI invocation: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 3 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz
